headline: Admiral Bradley 💦🚤 DROPS Second VENEZUELA Narco-BOAT BOMBS 💣🔥!
text:
White House 🏛️🍑 SPILLING TEA ☕ on US Navy 🛥️👨‍✈️ BOSS Admiral Frank Bradley 🎖️😤 ordering ROUND TWO 💥🔄 strikes on sketchy Venezuelan DRUG BOAT 🚤💊 – NO 'kill everybody' vibes from DefSec Pete Hegseth 🪖🛡️ tho, WaPo simps 🤡📱 got it TWISTED 😵‍💫! Press Sec Karoline Leavitt 💅📢 slaying the briefing: 'Bradley stayed IN BOUNDS ⚖️✨, Hegseth greenlit Sept 2 🔥📅 but DIDN'T drop that psycho order – Trump 🍊👑 & Pete made it CRYSTAL 💎: Narco-terrorist cartels 🐍💰 are FAIR GAME 🎯💀 under war laws!' Bipartisan snowflakes ❄️🇺🇸 like Sen Roger Wicker & Jack Reed 📜😠 vow PROBES 🕵️‍♂️🔍 into 'war crimes' – House & Senate Armed Services Committees GOING FULL DETECTIVE 🕵️‍♀️📋 for the DEETS!

Hegseth on X 🐦💨: 'STOP lethal DRUGS 🚫💊, SMASH narco-boats 🚤💥, YEET the poison-pushers 🐍😵 poisoning AMERICA 🇺🇸🍔!' Over 80 narcos PERMA-NAPPED 😵⚰️ since early Sept in Caribbean OP 🎮🌊 – Trump admin calls it SELF-DEFENSE 🛡️🇺🇸 against fentanyl floods 🌊☠️. Hegseth chats up Congress peeps 🗣️🏛️, calls WaPo smears 'FAKE NEWS 🔥🤥 inflammatory BS!' Trump backs his boy 100% 💯🍆: 'Pete's my GUY 👊!' They frame it as NON-INTERNATIONAL ARMED CONFLICT ⚔️📜 – Geneva rules say NO blasting wounded 🚫🩹, grab 'em instead 👮‍♂️🛡️... unlike Obama drone 'DOUBLE TAP' 😬💥 drama back in the day!

Venezuela Maduro simps 🇻🇪😡 RAGE in National Assembly 🤬🏛️: 'US STOKING WW3 🔥🌎 to TOPPLE us!' Vow their own PROBE into 'second strike' that allegedly smoked TWO SURVIVORS 👻💨 – but Trump team's like 'HOLD MY FREEDOM EAGLE 🦅🍑, we're just CLEANING HOUSE 🧹🚤 on drug lords!' Lawmakers SALTY 🧂😩, Hegseth PUSHING BACK 🥊: Fabricated HYPE! Caribbean now US NAVY PLAYGROUND 🛥️🎰🌴 with lethal narco-hunts – Trump 2.0 going FULL Rambo 🪖🔥 on cartels, while Dems cry 'oversight' tears 😭📊. Who's the real cuck? Narcos sinking FASTER than Titanic 🚤🧊💥‼️
